verses.latin_vulgate: Qui diligit disciplinam diligit scientiam ;  qui autem odit increpationes insipiens est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹהֵ֣ב מ֭וּסָר אֹ֣הֵֽב דָּ֑עַת וְשׂוֹנֵ֖א תוֹכַ֣חַת בָּֽעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that loveth correction, loveth knowledge: but he that hateth reproof, is foolish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka itsensä mielellänsä kurittaa antaa, se tulee toimelliseksi; mutta joka rankaisematta olla tahtoo, se on tyhmä.
verses.king_james: Whoso loveth instruction loveth knowledge: but he that hateth reproof is brutish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui bonus est hauriet gratiam a Domino ;  qui autem confidit in cogitationibus suis impie agit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֗וֹב יָפִ֣יק רָ֭צוֹן מֵיְהֹוָ֑ה וְאִ֖ישׁ מְזִמּ֣וֹת יַרְשִֽׁיעַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that is good, shall draw grace from the Lord: but he that trusteth in his own devices, doth wickedly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hyvä saa lohdutuksen Herralta, mutta häijy mies hyljätään.
verses.king_james: A good man obtaineth favour of the Lord: but a man of wicked devices will he condemn.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non roborabitur homo ex impietate,  et radix justorum non commovebitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יִכּ֣וֹן אָדָ֣ם בְּרֶ֑שַׁע וְשֹׁ֥רֶשׁ צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים בַּל־יִמּֽוֹט׃
verses.douay_rheims: Man shall not be strengthened by wickedness: and the root of the just shall not be moved.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei ihminen vahvistu jumalattomuudessa, vaan vanhurskaan juuri on pysyväinen.
verses.king_james: A man shall not be established by wickedness: but the root of the righteous shall not be moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mulier diligens corona est viro suo ;  et putredo in ossibus ejus, quæ confusione res dignas gerit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵֽשֶׁת־חַ֭יִל עֲטֶ֣רֶת בַּעְלָ֑הּ וּכְרָקָ֖ב בְּעַצְמוֹתָ֣יו מְבִישָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: A diligent woman is a crown to her husband: and she that doth things worthy of confusion, is as rottenness in his bones.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ahkera vaimo on miehensä kruunu, vaan häijy on niinkuin märkä hänen luissansa.
verses.king_james: A virtuous woman is a crown to her husband: but she that maketh ashamed is as rottenness in his bones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cogitationes justorum judicia,  et consilia impiorum fraudulenta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַחְשְׁב֣וֹת צַדִּיקִ֣ים מִשְׁפָּ֑ט תַּחְבֻּל֖וֹת רְשָׁעִ֣ים מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The thoughts of the just are judgments: and the counsels of the wicked are deceitful.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskasten ajatukset ovat vilpittömät, vaan jumalattomain aivoitus on petollinen.
verses.king_james: The thoughts of the righteous are right: but the counsels of the wicked are deceit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verba impiorum insidiantur sanguini ;  os justorum liberabit eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דִּבְרֵ֣י רְשָׁעִ֣ים אֱרׇב־דָּ֑ם וּפִ֥י יְ֝שָׁרִ֗ים יַצִּילֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The words of the wicked lie in wait for blood: the mouth of the just shall deliver them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalattomain sanat väijyvät verta, vaan hurskasten suu vapahtaa heitä.
verses.king_james: The words of the wicked are to lie in wait for blood: but the mouth of the upright shall deliver them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verte impios, et non erunt ;  domus autem justorum permanebit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָפ֣וֹךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים וְאֵינָ֑ם וּבֵ֖ית צַדִּיקִ֣ים יַעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Turn the wicked, and they shall not be: but the house of the just shall stand firm.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalattomat kaatuvat, ja ei ole sitte enää, mutta vanhurskasten huone pysyy.
verses.king_james: The wicked are overthrown, and are not: but the house of the righteous shall stand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Doctrina sua noscetur vir ;  qui autem vanus et excors est patebit contemptui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽפִי־שִׂ֭כְלוֹ יְהֻלַּל־אִ֑ישׁ וְנַעֲוֵה־לֵ֝֗ב יִהְיֶ֥ה לָבֽוּז׃
verses.douay_rheims: A man shall be known by his learning: but he that is vain and foolish, shall be exposed to contempt.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toimellinen mies neuvossansa ylistetään, vaan petollinen tulee katsotuksi ylön.
verses.king_james: A man shall be commended according to his wisdom: but he that is of a perverse heart shall be despised.

verses.latin_vulgate: Melior est pauper et sufficiens sibi  quam gloriosus et indigens pane.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֣וֹב נִ֭קְלֶה וְעֶ֣בֶד ל֑וֹ מִ֝מִּתְכַּבֵּ֗ד וַחֲסַר־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Better is the poor man that provideth for himself, than he that is glorious and wanteth bread.
verses.finnish_biblia: Parempi on nöyrä, joka omansa katsoo, kuin se, joka tahtoo iso olla, ja kuitenkin puuttuu leipää.
verses.king_james: He that is despised, and hath a servant, is better than he that honoureth himself, and lacketh bread.

verses.latin_vulgate: Novit justus jumentorum suorum animas ;  viscera autem impiorum crudelia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹדֵ֣עַ צַ֭דִּיק נֶ֣פֶשׁ בְּהֶמְתּ֑וֹ וְֽרַחֲמֵ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים אַכְזָרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: The just regardeth the lives of his beasts: but the bowels of the wicked are cruel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskas armahtaa juhtaansa, mutta jumalattoman sydän on halutoin.
verses.king_james: A righteous man regardeth the life of his beast: but the tender mercies of the wicked are cruel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui operatur terram suam satiabitur panibus ;  qui autem sectatur otium stultissimus est.  Qui suavis est in vini demorationibus,  in suis munitionibus relinquit contumeliam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹבֵ֣ד אַ֭דְמָתוֹ יִֽשְׂבַּֽע־לָ֑חֶם וּמְרַדֵּ֖ף רֵיקִ֣ים חֲסַר־לֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that tilleth his land shall be satisfied with bread: but he that pursueth idleness is very foolish.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka peltonsa viljelee, se saa leipää yltäkylläisesti; vaan joka turhia ajelee takaa, se on tyhmä.
verses.king_james: He that tilleth his land shall be satisfied with bread: but he that followeth vain persons is void of understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desiderium impii munimentum est pessimorum ;  radix autem justorum proficiet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָמַ֣ד רָ֭שָׁע מְצ֣וֹד רָעִ֑ים וְשֹׁ֖רֶשׁ צַדִּיקִ֣ים יִתֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that is delighted in passing his time over wine, leaveth a reproach in his strong holds. The desire of the wicked is the fortification of evil men: but the root of the just shall prosper.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumalatoin halajaa aina pahaa tehdä, mutta vanhurskaan juuri kantaa hedelmää.
verses.king_james: The wicked desireth the net of evil men: but the root of the righteous yieldeth fruit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter peccata labiorum ruina proximat malo ;  effugiet autem justus de angustia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּפֶ֣שַׁע שְׂ֭פָתַיִם מוֹקֵ֣שׁ רָ֑ע וַיֵּצֵ֖א מִצָּרָ֣ה צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the sins of the lips ruin draweth nigh to the evil man: but the just shall escape out of distress.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ilkiä käsitetään omissa sanoissansa, vaan vanhurskas pääsee hädästä.
verses.king_james: The wicked is snared by the transgression of his lips: but the just shall come out of trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: De fructu oris sui unusquisque replebitur bonis,  et juxta opera manuum suarum retribuetur ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִפְּרִ֣י פִי־אִ֭ישׁ יִשְׂבַּע־ט֑וֹב וּגְמ֥וּל יְדֵי־אָ֝דָ֗ם (ישוב) [יָשִׁ֥יב] לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: By the fruit of his own mouth shall a man be filled with good things, and according to the works of his hands it shall be repaid him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suun hedelmästä tulee paljon hyvää; ja niinkuin kukin käsillänsä tehnyt on, kostetaan hänelle.
verses.king_james: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth: and the recompence of a man’s hands shall be rendered unto him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Via stulti recta in oculis ejus ;  qui autem sapiens est audit consilia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דֶּ֣רֶךְ אֱ֭וִיל יָשָׁ֣ר בְּעֵינָ֑יו וְשֹׁמֵ֖עַ לְעֵצָ֣ה חָכָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes: but he that is wise hearkeneth unto counsels.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tyhmäin mielestä on hänen tiensä otollinen, mutta viisas ottaa neuvon.
verses.king_james: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes: but he that hearkeneth unto counsel is wise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fatuus statim indicat iram suam ;  qui autem dissimulat injuriam callidus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱוִ֗יל בַּ֭יּוֹם יִוָּדַ֣ע כַּעְס֑וֹ וְכֹסֶ֖ה קָל֣וֹן עָרֽוּם׃
verses.douay_rheims: A fool immediately sheweth his anger: but he that dissembleth injuries is wise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tyhmä osoittaa kohta vihansa, vaan joka peittää vääryyden, se on kavala.
verses.king_james: A fool’s wrath is presently known: but a prudent man covereth shame.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui quod novit loquitur, index justitiæ est ;  qui autem mentitur, testis est fraudulentus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָפִ֣יחַ אֱ֭מוּנָה יַגִּ֣יד צֶ֑דֶק וְעֵ֖ד שְׁקָרִ֣ים מִרְמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that speaketh that which he knoweth, sheweth forth justice: but he that lieth, is a deceitful witness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka totuuden puhuu, se vanhurskauden ilmoittaa; mutta joka väärin todistaa, hän pettää.
verses.king_james: He that speaketh truth sheweth forth righteousness: but a false witness deceit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Est qui promittit, et quasi gladio pungitur conscientiæ :  lingua autem sapientium sanitas est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֣שׁ בּ֭וֹטֶה כְּמַדְקְר֣וֹת חָ֑רֶב וּלְשׁ֖וֹן חֲכָמִ֣ים מַרְפֵּֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: There is that promiseth, and is pricked as it were with a sword of conscience: but the tongue of the wise is health.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka ajattelematta puhuu, hän pistää niinkuin miekalla; vaan viisasten kieli on terveellinen.
verses.king_james: There is that speaketh like the piercings of a sword: but the tongue of the wise is health.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labium veritatis firmum erit in perpetuum ;  qui autem testis est repentinus, concinnat linguam mendacii.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְֽׂפַת־אֱ֭מֶת תִּכּ֣וֹן לָעַ֑ד וְעַד־אַ֝רְגִּ֗יעָה לְשׁ֣וֹן שָֽׁקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The lip of truth shall be steadfast for ever: but he that is a hasty witness, frameth a lying tongue.
verses.finnish_biblia: Totinen suu pysyy vahvana ijankaikkisesti, vain väärä kieli ei pysy kauvan.
verses.king_james: The lip of truth shall be established for ever: but a lying tongue is but for a moment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dolus in corde cogitantium mala ;  qui autem pacis ineunt consilia, sequitur eos gaudium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֭רְמָה בְּלֶב־חֹ֣רְשֵׁי רָ֑ע וּֽלְיֹעֲצֵ֖י שָׁל֣וֹם שִׂמְחָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Deceit is in the heart of them that think evil things: but joy followeth them that take counsels of peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka pahaa ajattelevat, niiden sydämessä on petos; vaan jotka rauhaa neuvovat, niillä on ilo.
verses.king_james: Deceit is in the heart of them that imagine evil: but to the counsellors of peace is joy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non contristabit justum quidquid ei acciderit :  impii autem replebuntur malo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יְאֻנֶּ֣ה לַצַּדִּ֣יק כׇּל־אָ֑וֶן וּ֝רְשָׁעִ֗ים מָ֣לְאוּ רָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: Whatsoever shall befall the just man, shall not make him sad: but the wicked shall be filled with mischief.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei vanhurskaalle mitään vaaraa tapahdu; vaan jumalattomat pahuudella täytetään.
verses.king_james: There shall no evil happen to the just: but the wicked shall be filled with mischief.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abominatio est Domino labia mendacia ;  qui autem fideliter agunt placent ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹעֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה שִׂפְתֵי־שָׁ֑קֶר וְעֹשֵׂ֖י אֱמוּנָ֣ה רְצוֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Lying lips are an abomination to the Lord: but they that deal faithfully, please him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Petolliset huulet ovat Herralle kauhistus; vaan jotka oikein tekevät, ovat hänelle otolliset.
verses.king_james: Lying lips are abomination to the Lord: but they that deal truly are his delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Homo versatus celat scientiam,  et cor insipientium provocat stultitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָדָ֣ם עָ֭רוּם כֹּ֣סֶה דָּ֑עַת וְלֵ֥ב כְּ֝סִילִ֗ים יִקְרָ֥א אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: A cautious man concealeth knowledge: and the heart of fools publisheth folly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kavala salaa taitonsa, vaan hulluin sydän ilmoittaa hulluutta.
verses.king_james: A prudent man concealeth knowledge: but the heart of fools proclaimeth foolishness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus fortium dominabitur ;  quæ autem remissa est, tributis serviet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַד־חָרוּצִ֥ים תִּמְשׁ֑וֹל וּ֝רְמִיָּ֗ה תִּהְיֶ֥ה לָמַֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: The hand of the valiant shall bear rule: but that which is slothful shall be under tribute.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ahkera käsi saa hallita, vaan laiskan täytyy veronalaiseksi tulla.
verses.king_james: The hand of the diligent shall bear rule: but the slothful shall be under tribute.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mœror in corde viri humiliabit illum,  et sermone bono lætificabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּאָגָ֣ה בְלֶב־אִ֣ישׁ יַשְׁחֶ֑נָּה וְדָבָ֖ר ט֣וֹב יְשַׂמְּחֶֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Grief in the heart of a man shall bring him low, but with a good word he shall be made glad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sydämellinen murhe kivistelee, vaan lohdullinen sana iloittaa,
verses.king_james: Heaviness in the heart of man maketh it stoop: but a good word maketh it glad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui negligit damnum propter amicum, justus est ;  iter autem impiorum decipiet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָתֵ֣ר מֵרֵעֵ֣הוּ צַדִּ֑יק וְדֶ֖רֶךְ רְשָׁעִ֣ים תַּתְעֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that neglecteth a loss for the sake of a friend, is just: but the way of the wicked shall deceive them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskas on parempi lähimmäistänsä, mutta jumalattoman tie viettelee hänen
verses.king_james: The righteous is more excellent than his neighbour: but the way of the wicked seduceth them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non inveniet fraudulentus lucrum,  et substantia hominis erit auri pretium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־יַחֲרֹ֣ךְ רְמִיָּ֣ה צֵיד֑וֹ וְהוֹן־אָדָ֖ם יָקָ֣ר חָרֽוּץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The deceitful man shall not find gain: but the substance of a just man shall be precious gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei petollinen asia menesty, mutta ahkera saa hyvän tavaran.
verses.king_james: The slothful man roasteth not that which he took in hunting: but the substance of a diligent man is precious.

verses.latin_vulgate: In semita justitiæ vita ;  iter autem devium ducit ad mortem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּאֹֽרַח־צְדָקָ֥ה חַיִּ֑ים וְדֶ֖רֶךְ נְתִיבָ֣הֿ אַל־מָֽוֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the path of justice is life: but the bye-way leadeth to death.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskauden tiellä on elämä, ja hänen poluillansa ei ole kuolemaa.
verses.king_james: In the way of righteousness is life; and in the pathway thereof there is no death.
